title: Margar
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Margar1.jpg]] |name=Margar |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Quara/Legends|Quara]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes=Black |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|An Aqualish merchant? Shouldn't you be roughing up some Bith for credits?''"
"''Not all Aqualish are like that; besides, Bith are hard to come by.|[[Meetra Surik]] and Margar|''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''}} '''Margar''' was an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] illegal arms dealer in [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]] starport on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] whom [[Meetra Surik]] met, while searching for [[Kavar]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Margar }} [[Category:Aqualish]] [[Category:Business owners and executives]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Merchants]]
